name: devsecops-supply-chain-demo
description: A simple task management API for demonstrating DevSecOps supply chain security (SBOM, vulnerability scanning, artifact signing)

scripts.health: curl -s http://localhost:3000/health | node -e "process.stdin.resume(); process.stdin.on('data', d => { const h = JSON.parse(d); console.log(h.status === 'healthy' ? '✅ Healthy' : '❌ Unhealthy'); })"

author: Kelompok 8
